coverage_note: The bundled MTHFR population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from MTHFR folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000177000: MTHFR coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: MTHFR findings should be read against folate one-carbon metabolism, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate production, homocysteine remethylation, and methyl-donor balance; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T / Ala222Val) is curated as a MTHFR marker for Folate and homocysteine metabolism, Methyl-donor and one-carbon pathway context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs1801131 (MTHFR A1298C / Glu429Ala) is curated as a MTHFR marker for Folate and homocysteine metabolism, Methyl-donor and one-carbon pathway context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
